V0.dev vs SenseNova

Compare V0.dev and SenseNova: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

V0.dev

Vercel's AI UI generator. Describe or screenshot a UI and get React component code. Free plan: $5 monthly credits + 7 messages/day.

Pros

  • ✓Free tier sufficient for daily use
  • ✓High-quality generated code
  • ✓Deep Vercel ecosystem integration
  • ✓No credit card needed

Cons

  • ✗7 messages/day limit
  • ✗React stack only
  • ✗Complex UIs need multiple iterations

Key Features

Generate React UI from text descriptionsScreenshot-to-code conversionLive preview of generated resultsExport code to your projectConversational iterative editingBuilt on shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS
View Details →

SenseNova

SenseTime's LLM platform. Token Plan beta is completely free: 1500 calls per 5 hours. Supports native multimodal Flash-Lite (no vision-to-text conversion), U1-Fast, and DeepSeek-V4-Flash. OpenAI SDK compatible, no credit card needed.

Pros

  • ✓Completely free during beta
  • ✓Generous 1500 calls/5hrs quota
  • ✓Native multimodal, no text conversion
  • ✓Processes 100-page reports in 47s
  • ✓OpenAI SDK compatible
  • ✓No credit card needed

Cons

  • ✗Beta phase, may charge in the future
  • ✗Less known than GPT/Claude
  • ✗Smaller ecosystem

Key Features

Native multimodal understanding+generation1500 free calls per 5 hoursFlash-Lite skips vision-to-text conversion60% token consumption reductionOpenAI SDK compatibleOffice apps ecosystem
View Details →
